testcase.name: <golden:creditcard_phone_overlap>
testcase.failure: Line 1: VISA detected with 100.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: 4532 0151 1283 0366 Validator: creditcard Line 2: PHONE detected with 100.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: 212-555-0142 Validator: phone Line 1: PHONE detected with 50.0% confidence (LOW) Match: 0151 1283 0366 Validator: phone
